title: vitis labrusca var. aestivalis
intro: Vitis labrusca var. aestivalis, also known as the fox grape or summer grape, is a species of grapevine native to North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Vitis labrusca var. aestivalis include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
